title: Boat Rental in Marbella Costs and Tips for 2026
html:
If you are planning a trip to Marbella, renting a boat offers a fantastic way to explore the Costa del Sol. Departing from Puerto Banús or the Real Club de Marbella, you can find vessels for around 350 to 2,500 EUR per day. BoatHire24 makes it simple to compare verified listings and book your ideal day on the water.

Where to set off in Marbella

Marbella offers several marinas and bays for departing on a boat rental. Puerto Banús is the most famous, with luxury yachts and easy access to the sea. The Real Club de Marbella in the town centre is quieter and well-equipped. Cabopino Marina, east of the city, is smaller and charming, ideal for starting a trip to the Cabo Pino dunes. For anchoring, head to the Calahonda beaches or the picturesque cove of El Faro. Further out, the island of Isla de las Palomas near Tarifa is a scenic day destination, about 40 nautical miles south-west.

How much does it cost to rent a boat in Marbella?

Prices vary by boat type and season, typically from 350 to 2,500 EUR per day. Shared tours start from 50 EUR per person. Motorboats under 8 metres cost around 350 EUR for a half-day. Catamarans for full-day rentals range from 1,200 to 1,800 EUR. Crewed yachts with a skipper, such as an Azimut 58, cost between 1,800 and 2,500 EUR. You can browse boats for your dates on BoatHire24 to compare prices and availability.

  • Shared tour: from 50 EUR per person
  • Small motorboat half-day: from 350 EUR
  • Catamaran full-day: from 1,200 EUR
  • Crewed yacht: from 1,800 EUR per day

Which boat to rent

  1. Motor yacht, Best for luxury and speed, ideal for day trips with up to 12 guests. From 1,500 EUR. See this motor yacht for an example.
  2. Sailing catamaran, Best for stability and space, perfect for groups up to 10. From 1,200 EUR.
  3. Bowrider or speedboat, Best for short getaways and water sports, takes up to 8 guests. From 350 EUR for half-day.
  4. RIB with outboard, Best for a nimble ride and exploring coves, fits up to 6 passengers. From 300 EUR half-day.
  5. Traditional wooden boat, Best for a relaxed, classic feel, suitable for 10 guests. From 800 EUR.

When is the best season for boat rental in Marbella?

For the calmest conditions, go in the morning before the Levante wind picks up; it usually builds after lunch.

The high season runs from June to September, with July and August being busiest. The Levante wind can blow from the east, making afternoon conditions choppier. Boating is pleasant from April to October. Skippers are common on charters; if you have an International Certificate of Competence (ICC) or equivalent, you may rent bareboat, the operator will confirm exact requirements. In 2026, many visitors plan trips around the Starlite Festival, which runs from July to August.

Do you need a licence to rent a boat in Marbella?

For most motorboats over 6 metres, a licence or skipper is required. In Spain, the recreational boating licence (PER) is needed for larger vessels. For rentals without a licence, you can book a crewed boat or a small boat under 6 metres with limited power. The operator will confirm exact requirements for your chosen vessel.

At a glance

  • Price band: 350, 2,500 EUR per day
  • Peak months: June to September
  • Trip length: half-day (4 hours) or full-day (8 hours)
  • Max capacity: 12 passengers on a crewed yacht
  • Currency: EUR

Questions about boat rental in Marbella

Can I rent a boat in Marbella without a licence?

Yes, you can rent small boats under 6 metres or hire a skipper for any vessel.

How do I book a boat for the Starlite Festival?

Visit BoatHire24 and use the festival-specific page to find boats with evening availability near Puerto Banús.

What is the cancellation policy for Marbella boat rentals?

Most listings offer free cancellation up to 48 hours before departure, but check the individual policy on your booking.

Are pets allowed on boat rentals in Marbella?

Some owners permit pets; filter by pet-friendly when searching on BoatHire24.

Whether you want a crewed yacht or a self-drive motorboat, BoatHire24 helps you find and rent the perfect vessel in Marbella. If you own a boat here, you can also list your own and earn extra income. Start planning your trip now; browse the listings on BoatHire24 today.

Written by the BoatHire24 team, who book and list verified boats in Marbella and hundreds of destinations worldwide.
